title: buildah manifest push to aws ecr is not authenticating
body:
I have created multi-arch images and need to push to aws ecr. However the issue is that we cannot authenticate and getting this error: 

```
aws ecr get-login-password --region eu-west-2
13:14:24  + buildah login --username AWS --password-stdin 0000000000.dkr.ecr.eu-west-2.amazonaws.com
13:14:24  Error: get credentials: error getting credentials - err: exec: "docker-credential-ecr-login": executable file not found in $PATH, out: 
```

comments.body: hello @may-abdulla00 did you succeed to login and push to ecr ? can you share how do you solve your issue ?
